highlights.summary:
The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for Dr. MRAR PG Center admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How can I get into Dr. MRAR PG Center for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Dr. MRAR PG Center has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
M.Sc. Candidates completed B.Sc. or B.A. with Mathematics as one of the three equal subjects or as main subject from any recognised institute/university are eligible to apply.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.
M.Com Candidate must have completed Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com., ) Degree from any recognised University/Institute.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: About 40% to 50% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the average is 3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Deloitte, Wipro, and ITC. Roles offered are project manager, product manager, marketing manager, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. Classrooms are quite good. Labs are available. A library is available. All kinds of books for studying are available. There is no hostel. The canteen food is quite tasty. Good medical facilities are available. A sports week is conducted.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Vidhyapeeth Institute of Science & Technology.

review_content.Placements: None of the companies has visited the campus during my final year for placements. VIST does not even invite companies for internships. The last placements were conducted in 2016, and then our college management stopped inviting any company to the campus. It just helps you in signing documents if you find an internship on your own. I also did an internship like that.
review_content.Infrastructure: VIST does have a huge campus and lots of space. There were separate labs according to branches. VIST has one library where you can only get books related to our college courses. There is no public Wi-Fi for students, and they provide internet only for staff members. VIST doesn't have any hostel on the campus, but it helps students to find one hostel, which is good. There is one sports ground and one nice garden to relax.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: It is the worse college of Bhopal.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in our college, and if some companies visit here, then they are of no use. Placement department doesn't do any work, and they don't have any link with any company. Neither the college administration helps in placements. The maximum salary package offered is about 1 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't have any hostel, but they provide a private hostel which is far away from college. The hostel area has no connection with accommodation. Food quality is worse. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The library is good but lacks books collection. Labs are outdated.

review_summary.college_name: Jharkhand Raksha Shakti University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Forensic Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The campus is small, but it is government-run. The fees are pretty decent and affordable.

content.Placements: The college doesn’t provide any placements for the Bachelor’s degree since at present B.Sc. in Forensics is not eligible for job vacancies at FSL in certain states, but this policy is going to be changed they are working on it. And for internships, we do get many internship opportunities in many labs, police stations, and courts.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi at the university doesn’t work very well; sometimes the network on your own phones will not work. The library is decent with centralized AC, but staff do not switch it on most of the time. Classrooms also have centralized ACs, but they haven’t worked for 6 months, the gas in the AC has finished, and the authorities are not doing the job to fix that.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computer Application and Cyber Security (BCA CS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Jharkhand Raksha Shakti University- A brief before you get in.

content.Placements: As per the numbers, this college doesn't actually get you placed yet. You have to apply for off-campus placements, but there are people who got placed well. The highest package one of our seniors cracked was 40 LPA, and internships are all upon yourself, like how much you can push yourself to.
content.Infrastructure: There are nicely maintained classes with AC and Wi-Fi and a decent library. Though the college is running on a temporary building right now, it doesn't provide handy hostel facilities now; hence, there is no canteen or mess. Sports tournaments are held often in the playground, and the best of all is volleyball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Forensic Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: About Jharkhand Raksha Shakti University:

content.Placements: There is no concept of placements in our university. After completing the course, students prefer to enroll in M.Sc. in Forensic Science and prepare for the NET/JRF exams. Others start preparing for government exams like UPSC, SSC, and Banking.
content.Infrastructure: The university does not provide any hostels. Students find rooms nearby or live in PG accommodations. However, the faculty members are supportive. They are always ready to assist students in difficult situations. We also have a library on campus. Unfortunately, the laboratory facilities are inadequate. The chemicals in our labs are even expired.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Criminology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good placements were achieved in 2023, highlighting our excellent infrastructure.

content.Placements: The total strength of our classroom is 24 students. Placements are held in our college, with different companies from every department visiting, including Wipro and TCS. Every student gets an internship opportunity in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college boasts big libraries with all types of books available. The infrastructure is excellent, with spacious libraries, canteens, and Wi-Fi accessibility. The classrooms are also of good quality.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful to students and are qualified in NET JRF. The exam mode is moderate in our college, and teachers ensure the syllabus is prepared before exams. Our course is distinct from others, preparing students for their future goals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Forensic Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jharkhand Raksha Shakti University.

content.Placements: There are no placements in our course. There are no top recruiting companies that visit our campus for recruitment. There is also no placement cell. Almost 30% of students got internships in CID and SFSL.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is small. Classrooms are good, and Wi-Fi facilities are only available in the computer laboratory. The library is very good. There is no hostel. Mess facilities are also not available on campus. Sports and games are not good.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are good. They also provide practical knowledge that will be useful in the industry. Semester exams are average, and the pass percentage is 46%. The end-semester is worth 50 marks, and it's 70 for non-practical subjects.

admission_process.title: JRSU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JRSU admissionsare both merit and entrance-based.JRSUoffers courses at UG and PG level in multiple streams such as Arts, Science, Management, etc. Interested candidates can apply online for JRSU admission.

JRSU offers admission to most of the courses is merit-based. Candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below areJRSU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
UG degree with at least 50% aggregate
UG degree with at least 50% aggregate

JRSU admission process includes multiple steps. Aspirants are first required to apply for the course of their choice. The application form is available online on the official website of the university. Below is the step-wise admission process explained for JRSU:
Step 1: JRSU Application Process 2025
Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply online for admission. Candidates need to fill out the form and upload the specified documents to complete the application process.
Step 2: Selection Process
JRSU shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university evaluates the application form of the aspirants to confirm their eligibility.
Step 3: Merit List & Counselling

Once the selection rounds are completed, JRSU releases a merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates. Such candidates are further called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university

review_summary.college_name: T.B.M.L. College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of T.B.M.L. College.

content.Placements: Many chemical factories, major chemical laboratories, agriculture fertilizer companies and SIPCOT companies visit our college for placements. About 87 students pass in this department. From this course, students can also get in the teaching line. The highest salary offered was 1.2 lacs per month. The lowest salary offered in our course for the laboratory job was Rs. 16,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The laboratory is very good, and it has a maximum number of chemicals. It has the largest sports ground on the campus. Our college provides grounds for games like cricket, football, volleyball and kho kho for students to play games. A canteen is available, and it serves healthy food. It provides both men and women's high rich hostels on the campus. The quality of food served in a mess is good. The library has more than 4,000 books, and a Wi-Fi facility is available in the library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members in arts and science.

content.Placements: Many chemical factories, major chemicals laboratories, agriculture fertiliser companies, urea production companies and SIPCOT companies were top recruiters in this course. Above 85 students passed in this department. Minimum 70% of the chemistry students got internships from this course. In the teaching line, the highest salary offered is 1.5 lac per month. For laboratory jobs, the lowest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. PhD scholars got scientists opportunities in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are good, and a maximum number of chemicals are available. The biggest sports ground is available on this campus, and games like cricket, football, volleyball and Kho-Kho are played on this ground. A canteen is available. Hostel facilities are available for both men and women. High-class food is served in this hostel mess, and the quality of food is also good. The library has more than 500 books, and Wi-Fi is also available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Aggarwal College Facilities Are Very Affordable.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, a computer lab, a library, and a canteen. Books are supplied by the college for academic needs. The quality of food in the canteen is above average. The college actively celebrates festivals and organizes sports like badminton, boxing, and archery.

reviews.review_heading: Good college Placement guaranteed!
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in class, and they use LED panels for teaching. There is a good WiFi connection in all departments at Aggarwal College. The library is fully air-conditioned, and all the important books are available. The internet connection in the library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Totally dissatisfied with this course/college.
reviews.review_text: They have Wi-Fi everywhere in college, which I do like. The canteen is average, and there are water coolers. They promote sports more than studies and emphasize everything else but less on academics. The classrooms are cleaned but not that great, and students often get bored. The teachers don’t know how to use the smart boards.

reviews.review_heading: A budget friendly college .
reviews.review_text: Campus is not big as it should be but they provide many facilities like a good speed Wi-Fi, coding language labs, general labs, As many students come locally that's why they don't provide any hostel facilities. If you're planning from other state then you can live in PG. In this course they also provide the facility of frequent English  speaking. The drawback I found in their infrastructure is that they don't have any sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to get a degree, then take admission at this college.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good and labs and classrooms are just normal; they provide fans and blackboards. Wi-Fi is available but only for the teachers and staff.
No hostels are in college because the majority of students are from nearby places or local areas. Food is provided in canteens of average quality.

reviews.review_heading: Don't waste your time and money.
reviews.review_text: Most labs are working and have working computers; you can do only college work on them or work related to your course; you cannot run PUBG on them; they will surely cash. The canteen is one small dark room. Walls of the classes are tearing down, benches are the worst, and only take admission when every college rejects you.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with all facilities available for students.
reviews.review_text: For our course, mostly projectors were used to teach students. All classrooms were smart. Wi-Fi was available only for educational purposes. There was a central library, and each department had its library. The quality of the food in the mess was average. Medical facilities were available. Sports were available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has 2 libraries. They have many books related to courses. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Its speed is good compared to other colleges. The library is good and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The library is well-built and well-maintained. It has books related to courses and government competitive exams. Wi-Fi facility is available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with college fee structure. It is relevant compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Well-maintained library is built with Wi-Fi facilities. Our college library is fully automated, and the book-issuing process is also automated. Mess is not available but there is a small canteen where fast food like momos, samosa, etc., are available. Infrastructure is not well maintained. The building has beds.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied, because of college infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: There are two libraries available. AC is not provided by the college management. All books related to the course, are available for the students. Students also prepare for competitive exams in library. Canteen food is not so good, like other colleges.

reviews_list.review_title: College surroundings are peaceful and the environment is super cool in winter.

review_content.Placements: In our Information Technology batch 85 percent of students are placed. reviews.review_heading: It is good for students who really want to study.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi in labs, the library, and across the campus. We have good facilities in the mess and canteen. There is a sports zone and games facilities. Medical facilities are also available, including a nurse and ambulance service. We have a dispensary for medicines and health checkups, and doctors are also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: My Experience as an EEE Student at JNTU.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped Electrical, Machines, Power, and Electronics labs. We have a vast library. The hostel has clean rooms. The food is great as it is a student-managed hostel where they cook whatever we want. We have medical support available in our college. We have good sports facilities with courts and a gym.

reviews.review_heading: College surroundings are peaceful and the environment is super cool in winter.
reviews.review_text: The Information Technology department at JNTU Vizianagaram has well equipped computer labs with high speed Wi-Fi smart classrooms and a digital library. The hostel provides good facilities clean rooms and 24/7 water and power. The mess offers hygienic and tasty food and the canteen serves a variety of snacks. Medical facilities are available on campus with a health center and students actively participate in sports and games with well maintained grounds and indoor facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University College of Engineering, Vizianagaram.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with spacious classrooms, a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and well-equipped computer and electronics labs. The library has a good collection of academic and reference books though seating space can be limited during exams. Hostel facilities are satisfactory. Rooms are clean and maintained regularly. The mess food is average but hygienic. There are basic medical facilities and a small sports area for recreation. The infrastructure is decent but could be improved in ter...

reviews.review_heading: If you want leisure time to pursue your own ambitions without being academically stressed.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is below average, but the mess food is much better and bearable. The overall infrastructure is rigid and can be complicated if one doesn't adapt to it. Classrooms are spacious, but the labs are not equipped with adequate equipment. This is my experience.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members, better placements in 2023, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with projectors (hi-tech classes). Infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is available. Hostel is very good when compared to other hostels. The students run mess in hostel so hostel is good. College is equipped with a dispensary. Sports and games are allowed like conducting sports days.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good and its raw.
reviews.review_text: The hostel bathrooms are worse than you think, it is terrible. The environment looks like you are surrounded by mountains and rocks. Mostly buses have better chance to take look on snakes and even more times on scorpions and mostly centipedes man.

reviews.review_heading: JNTU College is better for people with financial issues. Not many placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the labs, classroom, and library is average. Infrastructure is not that much advanced technology, but somewhat better. Poor quality in hostel infrastructure & facilities. Mess food is somewhat better because of student organisation. Mess, sports, and medical have good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: If students have money then they can go to a good private college and if not then it is a fine place
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Even though there is room for development, our university has never made any step towards progress. Hostel rooms are fine. Food is also fine. I have not found a single insect in the food yet. There is a dispensary but only for medicine. There is a sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best for every student.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the point college, course, and classrooms are very neat and a good atmosphere gives the university a feel. The most important thing in college is food and hostel. Coming to the hostel and food, my college hostel food is very good. But hostel has some modifications.

reviews.review_heading: This college consists of good infrastructure, placements, academics, a hostel and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Hostels provide accommodation for students, faculty, and staff, often within a campus setting. They typically include residential blocks, recreational areas and sports facilities. According to some sources, hostels contribute to overall student experiences, which is good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college are good. The infrastructure of the college is also good. Wi-Fi is available, with high-speed connection, but we should pay the money for it. The labs available in our college are good, students can feel good, and can learn.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best platform for the engineering students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college are Wi-fi, programming labs, classrooms with projectors, and library. The hostel facilities are rooms with nice ventilation and food quantity as much as you want. Canteen is available. Sports ground also there and medical facilities also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of seniors. It has good faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In my college, all departments have good infrastructure. We have a central library with free access to Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, a good hostel, and a mess. The quality of food is very hygienic. We have 2 canteens in college with all available stationary and snacks at reasonable prices. We have one ambulance in emergency and medical staff members. We have all types of games and sports in my college.

reviews.review_heading: JNTUGV - Royal civil engineering.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is good and also provides good meals. College infrastructure is also excellent in hostels. Every branch has different rooms and two blocks are available at this college for boys. Classrooms infrastructure is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, mixed faculty experience, and outdated placement records.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good. All classes and labs are digital, fully AC, and have free Wi-Fi which is easy to access with a unique password for each student. In labs, we work together and make practical projects. Rooms in the hostel are very comfortable, and food in the hostel mess is very delicious in the evening. We have a canteen also and a good medical facility.

reviews.review_heading: No such kind of problem occurred in college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, with a Wi-Fi facility, more courses, departments, and labs. The classrooms are well-maintained and clean. The facilities of the hotels are very good, with enough size rooms, full ventilation, and good mess food.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, but students need to improve. They need to take it seriously.
reviews.review_text: Every lab and library is provided with Wi-Fi facility and AC. The infrastructure is good, and in some areas, they are developing it. The mess is too good, they used to cook delicious food, and all facilities are available in the hostel. The canteen is not that much good here. The medical facilities are available right in front of our college, and we can get any medicine for free. Till now, there are no sports and games, but from this year, they are introducing many activities like sports meets. ...

reviews.review_heading: The most prestigious textile college of North India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of ATIT College is not up to great standards, but yes, you get basic facilities in the college. The entire college campus is equipped with Wi-Fi. The main highlight of the college is its library, which I think is one of the most prestigious libraries, except for IITs.

reviews.review_heading: Placement is quite good but I am not satisfied from the faculty and the infrastructure of college.
reviews.review_text: Every class has CCTV facility, well air conditioned rooms, huge library with very old and expensive collection of books. Many of the books aren't available in the market but are very beneficial for the students. Hostel facility is very good as fresh RO drinking water is there and wifi facility also provided

reviews.review_heading: One of the oldest colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was not as good as described in the prospectus. The building needs maintenance, but the college management is not addressing this. The labs have Wi-Fi, but the speed is very slow. The hostel food is good, and the quality is satisfactory. The college also has its own dispensary.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences.
reviews.review_text: As college was built before independence, the maintenance of college is very bad. The college looks so old and demolished. There are no proper facilities in the canteen and very few rooms with air conditioning, and most of them are not working. The security guards are misbehaving.

reviews.review_heading: There is 100% Placement in 2021, 2022, and 2023. Infrastructure is Well and Good.
reviews.review_text: The college features well-maintained libraries and hostel rooms. The library offers Wi-Fi and AC facilities, and all classrooms are air-conditioned. The mess service is also very good. There are separate classrooms for each department, and all classes and libraries are equipped with AC.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. The infrastructure is average. Laboratories are very good. There is a garden on our campus. There is a decent library in this college. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The food quality is decent. Sports events are also organised in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good Placements in my department in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the college department are very good. Wi-Fi is available in our department with an average speed. Labs are well maintained and classrooms are also clean and air conditioned. Libraries are also in a very good condition with a lot of books available for studying and reading.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. Smart boards and projectors are available in classrooms, which help students understand things much earlier compared to the traditional way of teaching. The quality of the food is good. Games are available. The mess is excellent. The quality of the food in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and the hostel is average. It is old. The food in the hostel mess is very good. The diet plan and the infrastructure of the mess are good. They serve the food on time.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of its infrastructure, good faculty, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs for computer engineering students and others. Cassrooms are big enough. The library facility is good. There are four hostel buildings for students. There is a huge ground for sports like cricket, football, kabaddi, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many labs for computer science students and others for other branches. Classrooms are too large with enough space for proper study. The library facilities at the Technological Institute of Textiles and Sciences are so good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Technological Institute of Textile and Sciences
reviews.review_text: Our college has many labs for textile chemistry students and other branches. Classrooms are large and spacious to study. Library facility in our college is good. The infrastructure of our college is good.
